expected_output: Results go to stdout; errors and diagnostics go to stderr. The two streams are never mixed.
Exit code 1 is a user-input error. 0 is success, 2 is an environment/setup error, 3 and above are reserved.
Only LoRA and QLoRA adapter tuning. Full fine-tuning of large dense models is out of scope and is refused or downgraded to adapter-only.

input: What format are exported adapters in?
expected_output: Standard PEFT safetensors layout, so lobes can serve them and colleague can run them as a model backend.
